#!/bin/bash
# Launch Windows 3.11 for Workgroups under QEMU.
# - snapshot mode keeps /app/isos/win311.img immutable
# - VNC on display :1 (TCP 5901)
# - monitor unix socket for programmatic keyboard input (sendkey)
set -e
MON=/tmp/qemu-monitor.sock
rm -f "$MON"
exec qemu-system-i386 \
  -name win311 \
  -M pc \
  -m 32 \
  -hda /app/isos/win311.img \
  -snapshot \
  -vga std \
  -vnc :1 \
  -monitor unix:$MON,server,nowait \
  -daemonize

import sys
from collections import Counter
f=open('/tmp/t.ppm','rb');f.readline();w,h=map(int,f.readline().split());f.readline();d=f.read()

EOF
}

edits.new:
#!/bin/bash
#
# Launch Windows 3.11 for Workgroups under QEMU 5.2.0.
#
# Why QEMU 5.2.0: the win311.img guest crashes in 386-enhanced mode on modern
# QEMU (8.x). 5.2.0 (Debian bullseye build) runs it correctly. The 5.2.0
# binary + its bullseye libs were extracted under /opt/q52.
#
# Requirements satisfied here:
#  - snapshot mode  -> base image /app/isos/win311.img stays immutable
#  - VNC display :1 -> TCP 5901 for remote monitoring
#  - monitor unix socket -> programmatic keyboard input via `sendkey`
#  - Cirrus VGA     -> matches the guest's installed CL-GD5446 display driver
#  - ne2k_pci NIC   -> emulates the RTL8029 the guest expects (clean boot)
#
set -u
QEMU=/opt/q52/root/usr/bin/qemu-system-i386
export LD_LIBRARY_PATH=/opt/q52/root/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu:/opt/q52/root/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu
MON=/tmp/qemu-monitor.sock
rm -f "$MON"

exec "$QEMU" \
  -L /usr/share/seabios \
  -name win311 \
  -M pc \
  -m 32 \
  -hda /app/isos/win311.img \
  -snapshot \
  -vga cirrus \
  -net nic,model=ne2k_pci -net user \
  -vnc :1 \
  -monitor unix:"$MON",server,nowait \
  -daemonize

#

# The 5.2.0 (Debian bullseye) binary + libs are extracted under /opt/q52.

#  - Cirrus VGA     -> matches guest's installed CL-GD5446 display driver
#  - ne2k_pci NIC   -> emulates the RTL8029 the guest expects (clean boot)
#
set -u
QEMU=/opt/q52/root/usr/bin/qemu-system-i386
export LD_LIBRARY_PATH=/opt/q52/root/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu:/opt/q52/root/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu

  -M pc \
  -m 32 \
  -hda /app/isos/win311.img \
  -snapshot \
  -vga cirrus \
  -net nic,model=ne2k_pci -net user \
  -vnc :1 \
  -monitor unix:"$MON",server,nowait \
